zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Hastings於1276年出生在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，他的父親Hugh de Hastings34歲，母親Beatrice32歲。他於1292年之前與Agnes de Fillongley在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年在英國越可爾科比享年60歲，埋葬在英國素瑞藍白斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Hastings于1276年出生在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，他的父亲Hugh de Hastings34岁，母亲Beatrice32岁。他于1292年之前与Agnes de Fillongley在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1336年在英国越可爾科比享年60岁，埋葬在英国素瑞藍白斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Hastings was born in 1276, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Hugh de Hastings, was 34 and his mother, Beatrice, was 32. He married Agnes de Fillongley before 1292, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1336, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Lambeth, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Hastings est né en 1276, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Hastings, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Fillongley avant 1292, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1336, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Lambeth, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Hastings 1276 in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Hastings 34 und seine Mutter Beatrice 32. Er hat vor 1292 in England Agnes de Fillongley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1336 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kirby, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Lambeth, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Hastings è nato il nel 1276 nel Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Hastings, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Fillongley prima del 1292, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1336, nel Kirby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Lambeth, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Hastingsが1276年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Hastingsは34歳，母Beatriceは32歳であった。1292年以前にイギリスでAgnes de Fillongleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1336年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーで60歳で死去し，イギリススリーランベスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Hastings(이)가 1276년 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Hastings(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1292년 이전 영국에서 Agnes de Fillongley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 램스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Hastings nasceu em 1276, em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Hastings, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Fillongley antes 1292, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1336, em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Hastings родился в 1276 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Hastings было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Fillongley перед 1292 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1336 г. в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности лэмбет, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Hastings nació en 1276, en Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Hastings, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes de Fillongley antes de 1292, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1336, en Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra.
